2314030.name: Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra Demo
2314030.description:
The Hidden Orchestra Demo is on tour! They're cute. They're chibi. They're talented. But, they're shy!

In this hidden object game you will need to find hidden musician cats that are embarassed to play their music.

For every cat you find, you will hear a different musical instrument sound.

Make your own music! Enjoy 2 levels in this demo!
2314030.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其语
